series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by taxpayers who have reason to believe that an assessment or payment was illegal, erroneous, or excessive. This form is filed as required and is a three-part form. The original and pink copies are completed and returned by the taxpayer and maintained in office files in the Audit Review Section. The amber copy is retained by the taxpayer.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in files six (6) years from due date and destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain for 6 years from due date and then delete., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
